title: Whisk,Stainless Steel Semi-Automatic Egg Whisk,Hand Push Whisk Blender,Rotating Push Mixer Stirrer for Whisking,Beating,Stirring,Egg Beater,Milk Frother,Kitchen Cooking Tools for Home Restaurants
features: 【Semi-Automatic Design】The semi-automatic egg beater adopts a spring design, so it does not require batteries or electricity when working. Just press the handle and the mixer will effortlessly blend the egg mixture evenly. Energy saving and environmental protection!
【Wide Application】This egg whisk can also be used as a milk frother, suitable for whisking various ingredients such as eggs and butter. It's also a great tool for mixing coffee and cocktails.

【Food Grade Stainless Steel】The hand push blender is made of food grade stainless steel, sturdy and equipped with a plastic handle, which is comfortable to hold without worrying about bending or breaking. The semi-automatic blender has a long service life and saves you time and energy.

【Easy to Clean】You can quickly rotate the eggs and then spread the cream evenly and finely, just press lightly. The Stainless Steel Whipped Protein Cake is dishwasher safe, or just use warm water and soap, rinse and tap.
【Multi-purpose】Perfect for egg whites, suitable for your meringues, omelettes, latte and cappuccino cakes, mayonnaise, gravies, salad dressings, batter mixes, cake mixes, no more lumpy cakes .
description: Product Description EGG BEATER IS A GREAT TOOL FOR KITCHEN. The egg beater can not only use for cooking and baking but also be a great bar tool for quickly shaking or stirring cocktails and coffee. No mess and No yolk slips through with this tool,say goodbye to "switch from eggs shell to egg shells",separating the yolk from the white a snap! Food Grade Stainless Steel The egg beater is made of high quality stainless steel. could be used for any food, One-piece molding, not easy to fall off.rensure long-lasting use and make your cooking always safe and health. Package List: 1* Whisk Specifications: Material: Stainless Steel Color: Black Size: approx. 24*5.5cm/ 9.45* 2.17in Weight: approx. 58g/ 2.04oz Egg Whisk It's very convinent to use without using any electricity or batteries and without any noise like electric mixer ,you simply press down on the whisk and it rotates on its own without you having to use any wrist movement. it works just as fast as an electric mixer, but you don't have to plug in anything Easy to Use The egg whisk is easy to use and designed with a semi-automatic function. Rotating the egg head, just push down and release upward, you can quickly and evenly mix the egg liquid. Easy to Clean into the dishwasher. Sweet Family Time Cooking with your family will be a perfect family activity. How To Use Widely Uses The hand push whisk blender makes it easy to whisk eggs, cream, milk, and other liquids. Suitable for daily cooking, meat, cake baking, food seasoning, etc.
